description: Managed-agent definition for the synthetic support-ticket classifier workflow.

context_inputs: agent run id when invoked through the managed-agent CLI
idempotency key when supplied by the caller
context_boundaries: use only caller-provided ticket subject and body
use only bundled public-safe fixtures for evals
do not retrieve private customer records
domain.provider_policy: mock-provider-first; optional configured providers must use the shared provider factory and reliability wrapper

touch_surface: trace rows written through the shared trace store
eval run and eval case metrics written during deterministic evals
review_requirements: route needs_review=true outputs to human review surfaces
keep rejected validation outputs out of downstream automation
declare review routing policy without expanding queue behavior in this milestone
guardrail_enforcement: guardrail outcome recorded as accepted, needs_review, or rejected
PII and sensitive-text checks can force review or rejection
